about.heading: About me
about.bio: Senior Fullstack Engineer with 14+ years of experience across Colombia and Spain. I've built enterprise systems at Daimler, Lululemon, and Elavon — and now I build AI-powered tools and custom frameworks from scratch.
about.era1_desc: 14 years. Colombia → Spain. From junior to Senior Lead. Enterprise scale at Daimler, Lululemon, Elavon, Globant. Led teams, defined architecture, trained developers.
about.era2_desc: Adopted agentic AI as a force multiplier. Built fTree, a custom JSX framework from scratch. Trading bots with Python, FastAPI and multi-exchange support.
